channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Storms across US bring heavy snow, dangerous ice and a tornado in California
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A tornado near a mall in central California swept up cars, uprooted trees and sent several people to the hospital. In San Francisco, authorities issued the first-ever tornado warning. Elsewhere, inclement weather plagued areas of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What we know about drones over New Jersey, other parts of the US
item.description: The drones have prompted concern from local residents, anger from lawmakers and endless speculation on social media.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, Fox 5

item.title: Texas company says baby poop and fungi could be the solution to plastic waste
item.description: A dirty diaper may be gross to you, but one Texas company believes it could be the secret ingredient to helping answer an environmental question: How do we clean up all of our plastic waste?
item.dc:creator: Eric Henrikson, KREX 5

item.title: California warehouse fire sends toxic smoke into the air
item.description: A large fire at a commercial building in the city of Commerce sent toxic smoke into the air late Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Photos: US storms bring heavy snow, dangerous ice and a tornado in California
item.description: In San Francisco, authorities issued the first-ever tornado warning. Meanwhile, upstate New York saw heavy snow, the Midwest encountered an ice storm, and severe weather warnings were issued around Lake Tahoe.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: New Jersey teacher taped 9-year-old boy to desk for nearly an hour, police say
item.description: A teacher in New Jersey was charged after he allegedly taped a nine-year-old student to his desk, while a teacher's aide was accused of failing to intervene.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 6 ways to avoid a financial holiday hangover
item.description: The festivity of December is replaced all too quickly by the due dates of January, when the bills from holiday spending and travel arrive.
item.dc:creator: Kimberly Palmer, ABC 4

item.title: ABC agrees to give $15 million to Donald Trump's presidential library to settle defamation lawsuit
item.description: ABC News has agreed to pay $15 million toward Donald Trump’s presidential library to settle a defamation lawsuit over anchor George Stephanopoulos' inaccurate on-air assertion that the president-elect had been found civilly liable for raping writer E.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Storms encase Iowa and eastern Nebraska in ice and generate rare tornado warning in San Francisco
item.description: A major ice storm created treacherous driving conditions across Iowa and eastern Nebraska this weekend and prompted temporary closures of Interstate 80 after numerous cars and trucks slid off the road.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thousands of Santas and a few Grinches hit the streets for annual SantaCon bar crawls
item.description: Thousands of Kris Kringles and jolly Old St. Nicks are jamming streets, sidewalks and bars from Adelaide to Vancouver on Saturday for annual SantaCon charity pub crawls.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A look back at the most notable bankruptcies of 2024
item.description: This year saw its fair share of bankruptcies, with household names and century-old companies in the mix.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KRON4

item.title: Exonerated woman awarded $34M after jury finds Las Vegas police fabricated evidence in 2001 killing
item.description: Kirstin Lobato, who was wrongly convicted twice and served nearly 16 years in a Nevada state prison for a 2001 killing she did not commit, was awarded $34 million in a civil trial.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Detroit area's many Syrians are celebrating Assad's overthrow and planning long-delayed visits
item.description: Like millions of Syrians around the world, the thousands who have settled in the Detroit area are excited about the prospect of visiting now that rebels have overthrown the government of ousted President Bashar Assad.
item.dc:creator: Corey Williams And Mike Householder, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, Fox 5

item.title: Woman arrested smuggling pounds of meth wrapped as a Christmas gift
item.description: Customs officers arrested a traveler who investigators say tried to smuggle pounds of methamphetamine disguised as a Christmas gift into New Zealand last weekend.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Unger, NewsNation

item.title: Memphis man guilty of killing wife during Fiji honeymoon
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. -- A court in Fiji has convicted a Memphis man for the murder of his wife during their honeymoon in the island country more than two years ago, the victim's family confirmed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Moon, NewsNation

item.title: Woman who falsely accused Duke lacrosse players of rape in 2006 publicly admits she lied
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — The woman who in 2006 falsely accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her — making national headlines that stirred tensions about race, class and the privilege of college athletes — has admitted publicly for the first time that she made up the story.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California DMV apologizes for Cybertruck's license plate but family cites misinterpretation
item.description: On Thursday, the license plate in question, which was on a Tesla Cybertruck, was spotlighted in a post to X by StopAntisemitism, a group “dedicated to fighting anti-Semitism.” The family, however, argues it is being misread.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump says GOP will push to eliminate daylight saving time
item.description: President-elect Trump on Friday said Republicans would push to eliminate daylight saving time, calling it "inconvenient" and "costly.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: New York City mayor meets with Trump's 'border czar' to discuss how to go after 'violent' criminals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York City Mayor Eric Adams met with President-elect Donald Trump's incoming “border czar” on Thursday, with the Democratic mayor expressing an enthusiasm to work with the incoming administration to pursue violent criminals in the city while Trump promises mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Justice Department, Louisville reach deal after probe prompted by Breonna Taylor killing
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — The U.S. Justice Department and the city of Louisville have reached an agreement to reform the city’s police force after an investigation prompted by the fatal police shooting of Breonna Taylor and police treatment of protesters, officials said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: DYLAN LOVAN and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: North Dakota regulators OK underground storage for proposed Midwest carbon dioxide pipeline
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — North Dakota regulators approved permits Thursday for underground storage of carbon dioxide delivered through a massive pipeline proposed for the Midwest, marking another victory for a project that has drawn fierce opposition from landowners.
item.dc:creator: JACK DURA and STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fentanyl found inside dolphins in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Traces of fentanyl were found inside bottlenose dolphins that were found dead in the Gulf of Mexico, raising concerns that the deadly drug may be affecting other sea life.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, Fox 5

item.title: McDonald's employee who called 911 in CEO's shooting is eligible for a reward, but it will take time
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — More than 400 tips were called into the New York Police Department's Crime Stoppers tip line during the five-day search for a masked gunman who ambushed and fatally shot UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson last week.
item.dc:creator: CLAUDIA LAUER, Associated Press, ABC 4
